title: Anger
description: Makes angered neutral mobs attack all nearby players
body:
# Anger
Required Plugin: https://modrinth.com/plugin/kotlinplugins
- If some player attacks neutral mobs, they will become angered and instead of attacking only one player, all people nearby will be attacked thanks to special gamerules.
- The purpose of this plugin is to express the realistic anger of mobs and increase difficulty.   

- Check out other plugins: https://modrinth.com/user/Winlyps
